__fixture__.name: activity_stream_frozen_insert_before_anchor
__fixture__.scenario: A reverse-chronology activity stream is frozen on a review event while newer deployment and approval events arrive above it. The surface buffers the inserts, keeps the current event anchor stable, and makes the hidden activity count explicit instead of moving the list underneath the reviewer.
